case_for: Cousins is projected for 28.6 points and has cleared 12.0 in four of his last six games, including two 28+ point outings, showing he can easily clear a modest bar when things click.
case_against: His week-to-week volatility includes multiple sub-8-point duds (wk4, wk7), showing real risk of a poor, low-volume game that misses the threshold.
